pi_items.source: task_utils.sh setup_libreoffice_base_task function, line 115 sets default odb_path parameter to /home/ga/chinook.odb; export_result.sh line 19 confirms same path
Verified against Chinook SQLite database (examples/dbeaver_env/data/chinook.db); Metal genre exists with GenreId=3 and contains 374 tracks
Specification confirmed in verifier.py line 19 and task description; IsDeleted is a valid column name to be added to Track table
Specification confirmed in verifier.py line 190 and task description; ActiveTracks is a valid view name to be created

Verified against Chinook SQLite database: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tracks returns 3503; also confirmed by SchemaSpy documentation (schemaspy.org/samples/chinook/tables/Track.html) stating 'Table contained 3503 rows'

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a well-known public sample database representing a digital media store. The Track table contains exactly 3503 rows. The Metal genre exists in the database with 374 tracks. The database will be stored at /home/ga/chinook.odb as specified in the task utilities. The task requires adding an IsDeleted boolean column to the Track table and creating an ActiveTracks view to filter active records.
